title: The Terrifying Script
description: A Modpack Based On The Broken Script Mod. Now Out For Both Forge And NeoForge!
body:
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84a941bee013fc44e0d1d8cfb8a7674e4fde1649.png)



                                                         The World They Built
                                                         The World They Hated



Below is a screenshot of the error. The developers (either NeoForge developers or TBS developers) are going to fix this as soon as possible. But for now, please stay with NeoForge 21.1.80 or earlier until this has been resolved. Thank you.
# What Is This Modpack About?

The Modpack Based Around The Mod Called [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) Made By A Dev Named [WendigoDrip](https://modrinth.com/user/wendigodrip) Which Mainly Focuses Recreating The Famous Mark101 ARG, But It Also Adds Alot More To The Game Except The ARG Reacreating! And The Modpack Adds More Atmosphere To The Mod, More Features, And Gives Alot More To Explore

# Is This Modpack Made For MultiPlayer?

**No, When Was 1.9 Made. It Ruined Multiplayer/LAN So You Need To Install 1.8 Version From Somewhere, But I Recommend Installing It From This [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/thebrokencommunity) It Has All The Versions From 1.8 To 1.9.2!**

# What Are The Horror Mods Included?

**You May Think Its ONLY [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) But I Also Added [From The Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog) For More ARG/Alpha Feelings!**

# Can I Use This For A Video?

**Of-Course, But Please Credit Me And Leave The Link For This Modpack :D**

# 1.19.2 Port?

**Never, Wendigo Will Never Make A 1.19.2 Version So No.**

# Best Shaders To Use With The Modpack?

- Genesis
- Rudimentury

# Inspired By The [The Forbidden Script](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-forbidden-script) Modpack, Go Show Some Love To Him Too!
